mapper.select: select distinct to_char(STATUS) as typeValue,'status' as type from () union all select distinct projectName as typeValue,'projectName' as type from () union all select distinct to_char(prgType) as typeValue,'prgType' as type from () union all select distinct businessName as typeValue,'businessName' as type from ()

select ID,INPUT_TABLENAME as inputTableName,INPUT_NUM as inputNum,OUTPUT_TABLENAME as outputTableName, OUTPUT_NUM as outputNum,TASK_ID as taskId,ROW_SPAN as rowSpan from M_FLOW_IN_OUT_RECORD where TASK_ID = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select prg_type from m_flow_three where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
